title: Alumni Meet 2026
content: Alumni Meet 2026 Let's Celebrate, Reconnect and Reflect 24th January, 2026, Saturday Jaypee University of Information Technology, Waknaghat 00 DAYS 00 HOURS 00 MINUTES 00 SECONDS About the Event We are excited to invite all alumni to reconnect and reminisce about the cherished memories made during your time at JUIT. Join us for an unforgettable experience filled with networking, celebrations, and more. Purpose & Activities Celebrate Milestones 10 years of Class of 2015, 15 years of Class of 2010. Reconnect alumni and faculty Strengthen bonds between alumni, faculty, and current students.. Cultural Programs Music, dance, and talent showcases by alumni and students. Felicitation Ceremony Honoring alumni contributions. Panel Discussions Alumni sharing experiences and insights. Campus Tour Relive memories and witness JUIT’s growth. Eligibility All JUIT alumni from batches 2006–2022 (UG- Entry Year 2002 to 2018, PG 2002 to 2020) with their family members. Faculty and Staff. Current students (limited participation as volunteers and learners). Registration Includes meal and kit ₹1000/- Per participant Register Includes meal and kit for family ₹1500/- Per family Register Convener Details Meet the organizing team behind this memorable event Dr. Saurabh Bansal Convener Faculty In-charge, JUIT Alumni Cell Dr. Tanu Sharma Convener Associate Professor, HSS Dr. Nishant Jain Convener Assistant Professor, ECE Co-Convener Details Dr. Surajit K Hazra Associate Professor, (PMS) PMS Faculty Coordinator, JUIT Alumni Cell Dr. Amardeep Associate Professor, (Civil) Civil Faculty Coordinator, JUIT Alumni Cell Dr. Pradeep K Pandey Associate Professor, (Maths) Maths Faculty Coordinator, JUIT Alumni Cell Dr. Ruchi Verma Assistant Professor, (CSE) CSE Faculty Coordinator, JUIT Alumni Cell JUIT Alumni Cell - Student Team Arin Kumar JAC President Anvesh JAC Secretary Sarvesh Finance Head Abhinav Bajpeyi JAC PR Head Sanya Arora JAC PR Head Uday Singh Bisht JAC PR Head Event Gallery Glimpses from previous alumni meets Sponsorship Opportunities We invite alumni and supporters to become sponsors of our upcoming Alumni Meet. Your sponsorship will help us create an unforgettable event filled with meaningful activities, inspiring reunions, and lasting memories. As a sponsor, your name and/or logo will be prominently displayed on our Alumni Meet website, providing valuable visibility and recognition within our vibrant community. Interested sponsors can contact Dr. Saurabh Bansal at saurabh.bansal@juitsolan.in or 9882194150. Join us in supporting this special occasion and showcase your commitment. Be a proud sponsor and help us make this reunion a remarkable success! Contact Us Email juit.alumnicell@juitsolan.in saurabh.bansal@juitsolan.in Contact Us Dr. Saurabh Bansal: 988 219 4150 , +91 1792 239 222 Mr. Arin Kumar: +91 7976 784 577 Socials
